---
<<<<<<< HEAD
title: "Team"
title-block: false
=======
title: " "
>>>>>>> c9c25136c8f36683ccdd3e83f1391a74a10a43f1
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.team-hero-card}
![](images/photo_20251119.jpg){.team-hero-img alt="단체사진"}
:::


## Professor

::: {.professor-layout}

<div class="prof-left">
  <img src="images/professor1.png" class="prof-photo" alt="Professor">
</div>

<div class="prof-right">

### Sang-Il Lee

**Office**: [Room 319, Building 10, College of Education, Seoul National University](https://www.google.com/maps?q=37.460373,126.955093)

🎓 Ph.D. in Geography, The Ohio State University  
🎓 M.A. in Geography Education, Seoul National University  
🎓 B.A. in Geography Education, Seoul National University  

#### 📖 Research Interests
- Spatial Data Science  
- Spatial Data Analysis and Spatial Statistics  
- Cartography and GeoVisualization  
- Geographic Information Systems (GIS)  
- Population Geography and Spatial Demography  
- Geography of Education  

<div class="profile-icons">
  <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=ko&user=gb4QsEQAAAAJ" target="_blank">
    <img src="images/Google_Scholar_logo.svg.png" class="icon-link" alt="Google Scholar">
  </a>

  <a href="https://sangillee.snu.ac.kr/" target="_blank">
    <img src="images/homepage.png" class="icon-link" alt="Homepage">
  </a>
</div>

</div>
:::

## Master Students

<div class="member-grid">

<div class="member-card">
<img src="images/Nam.jpeg" class="member-photo" alt="Hyekyeong Nam">
<div class="member-info">
<h3>Hyekyeong Nam</h3>
<div class="member-role">M.A. Student</div>
<div class="badge-container">
<span class="badge">Spatial Data Science</span>
</div>

<div class="member-icons">
<a href="https://mail.google.com/mail/?view=cm&fs=1&to=nhk675@snu.ac.kr" target="_blank" aria-label="Email">
<img src="images/mail2.png" class="member-icon" alt="Email">
</a>
<a href=" " target="_blank" aria-label="Homepage">
<img src="images/homepage.png" class="member-icon" alt="Homepage">
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="member-card">
<img src="images/Kim.png" class="member-photo" alt="Woohyung Kim">
<div class="member-info">
<h3>Woohyung Kim</h3>
<div class="member-role">M.A. Student</div>
<div class="badge-container">
<span class="badge">Spatial Data Science</span>
<span class="badge">GeoAI</span>
</div>

<div class="member-icons">
<a href="https://mail.google.com/mail/?view=cm&fs=1&to=whk3423@snu.ac.kr" target="_blank" aria-label="Email">
<img src="images/mail2.png" class="member-icon" alt="Email">
</a>
<a href="https://geowhk.github.io/" target="_blank" aria-label="Homepage">
<img src="images/homepage.png" class="member-icon" alt="Homepage">
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="member-card">
<img src="images/Jeong.jpeg" class="member-photo" alt="Minseop Jeong">
<div class="member-info">
<h3>Minseop Jeong</h3>
<div class="member-role">M.A. Student</div>
<div class="badge-container">
<span class="badge">Population Geography</span>
</div>

<div class="member-icons">
<a href="https://mail.google.com/mail/?view=cm&fs=1&to=jms7061@snu.ac.kr" target="_blank" aria-label="Email">
<img src="images/mail2.png" class="member-icon" alt="Email">
</a>
<a href=" " target="_blank" aria-label="Homepage">
<img src="images/homepage.png" class="member-icon" alt="Homepage">
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="member-card">
<img src="images/Park.jpeg" class="member-photo" alt="Seowoo Park">
<div class="member-info">
<h3>Seowoo Park</h3>
<div class="member-role">M.A. Student</div>
<div class="badge-container">
<span class="badge">Spatial Data Science</span>
<span class="badge">Remote sensing</span>
</div>

<div class="member-icons">
<a href="https://mail.google.com/mail/?view=cm&fs=1&to=seowoo0805@snu.ac.kr" target="_blank" aria-label="Email">
<img src="images/mail2.png" class="member-icon" alt="Email">
</a>
<a href="https://seowoo-85.github.io/" target="_blank" aria-label="Homepage">
<img src="images/homepage.png" class="member-icon" alt="Homepage">
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<<<<<<< HEAD
<div class="member-card">
<img src="images/Yun.jpg" class="member-photo" alt="Sori Yun">
<div class="member-info">
<h3>Sori Yun</h3>
<div class="member-role">M.A. Student</div>
<div class="badge-container">
<span class="badge">Spatial Data Science</span>
</div>

<div class="member-icons">
<a href="https://mail.google.com/mail/?view=cm&fs=1&to=sound722@snu.ac.kr" target="_blank" aria-label="Email">
<img src="images/mail2.png" class="member-icon" alt="Email">
</a>
<a href=" " target="_blank" aria-label="Homepage">
<img src="images/homepage.png" class="member-icon" alt="Homepage">
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="member-card">
<img src="images/Dai.jpg" class="member-photo" alt="Dai Yifan">
<div class="member-info">
<h3>Dai Yifan</h3>
<div class="member-role">M.A. Student</div>
<div class="badge-container">
<span class="badge">GIS</span>
<span class="badge">Machine Learning</span>
</div>

<div class="member-icons">
<a href="https://mail.google.com/mail/?view=cm&fs=1&to=yif_daii0205@snu.ac.kr" target="_blank" aria-label="Email">
<img src="images/mail2.png" class="member-icon" alt="Email">
</a>
<a href=" " target="_blank" aria-label="Homepage">
<img src="images/homepage.png" class="member-icon" alt="Homepage">
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

=======
>>>>>>> c9c25136c8f36683ccdd3e83f1391a74a10a43f1
</div>

## Alumni

### Recent Graduates

- **Hyemin Jeon (M.A., 2025)**
- **Sechang Kim (M.A., 2023)**: Ph.D. Student at University of Washington


## Join Our Lab

If you are interested in joining our lab, please feel free to contact us!

**Contact**: [si_lee@snu.ac.kr](mailto:si_lee@snu.ac.kr)
